paper_focus.title: Microstructural Evolution and Mechanical Properties of Nb-Containing Medium-Mn Low-Density Steels
paper_focus.research_objective: To elucidate the role of Nb in regulating nano-scale precipitation (NbC and κ-carbide) and corresponding strengthening mechanisms in medium-Mn low-density steel.

visual_evidence.description: Figure 1 presents X-ray diffraction (XRD) patterns comparing the phase evolution of Fe-12Mn-9Al-3Cr-1.4C steels with 0.02 wt% and 0.04 wt% Nb under different aging conditions. Subfigure (a) displays patterns for 0.02Nb...

This figure presents scanning electron microscopy (SEM) micrographs illustrating the microstructural evolution of Nb-containing medium-Mn low-density steels with compositions Fe-12Mn-9Al-3Cr-1.4C-0.02Nb (panels a-d) and...

This figure presents a transmission electron microscopy (TEM) bright-field image showing a NbC precipitate within the austenite (γ) matrix of Fe-12Mn-9Al-3Cr-1.4C-0.02Nb low-density steel. The main micrograph displays a...
